creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
There is an updated version now - 0.8.  I took the liberty of actually making
this port work >8^).

-snip-

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#       xhippo
#       xhippo/Makefile
#       xhippo/files
#       xhippo/files/md5
#       xhippo/pkg
#       xhippo/pkg/COMMENT
#       xhippo/pkg/DESCR
#       xhippo/pkg/PLIST
#       xhippo/pkg/MESSAGE
#
echo c - xhippo
mkdir -p xhippo > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xhippo/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >xhippo/Makefile << 'END-of-xhippo/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   xhippo
X# Version required:                    0.8
X# Date created:                                16 March 1999
X# Whom:                                        Rod Taylor <tr49986@rcc.on.ca>
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=      xhippo-0.8
XCATEGORIES=    audio
XMASTER_SITES=  http://zenchaos.netpedia.net/software/
X
XMAINTAINER=    tr49986@rcc.on.ca
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=   mpg123:${PORTSDIR}/audio/mpg123
XLIB_DEPENDS=   gtk12.1:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE= yes
XCONFIGURE_ENV= GTK_CONFIG="${X11BASE}/bin/gtk12-config"
XUSE_XLIB=      yes
X
Xpost-install:
X       @${CAT} ${PKGDIR}/MESSAGE
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-xhippo/Makefile
echo c - xhippo/files
mkdir -p xhippo/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xhippo/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >xhippo/files/md5 << 'END-of-xhippo/files/md5'
XMD5 (xhippo-0.8.tar.gz) = 054b48c0b5964fdf6daf0e6cbc5e781c
END-of-xhippo/files/md5
echo c - xhippo/pkg
mkdir -p xhippo/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xhippo/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >xhippo/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-xhippo/pkg/COMMENT'
XA Generic music player for UNIX systems.
END-of-xhippo/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - xhippo/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >xhippo/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-xhippo/pkg/DESCR'
XXhippo is a Generic music player for Unix.  Written in GTK, it has optional
XGNOME support.
X
XIt supports all types of files, defaults including mp3, midi, wav, etc.
X
XMore can be added via the configuration file using external players
END-of-xhippo/pkg/DESCR
echo x - xhippo/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >xhippo/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-xhippo/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/xhippo
END-of-xhippo/pkg/PLIST
echo x - xhippo/pkg/MESSAGE
sed 's/^X//' >xhippo/pkg/MESSAGE << 'END-of-xhippo/pkg/MESSAGE'
X***
XPlaylists should be created like:
Xfind ~/sound -name *.mp3 | sort > playlist
END-of-xhippo/pkg/MESSAGE
exit

-snap-

---
Chris Piazza    Abbotsford, BC, Canada
           cpiazza@home.net
finger norn@norn.ca.eu.org for PGP key
